meaning: adj.过于活跃的,活跃得不正常的
examples: Conversely, if it's overactive, your metabolic rate speeds up.
Mostly, Arcturus would dismiss the dreams as whims of an overactive imagination.
Also, because one parathyroid was overactive, the other three had become dormant.
It might be able to selectively turn off brain cells that are overactive, as in epilepsy.
Lab evidence indicates that an overactive EGF system may help tumors produce more VEGF.
